basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 436 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates searching for a one-line overview of the GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Bharti 2026 can refer to the snapshot below before checking the detailed sections. This table brings together the post name, organization, total vacancies, last date, and application mode so that the most important facts are visible at a glance. It is meant to answer the "what, where, and by when" of this recruitment instantly.

application_fee.details: Candidates asking how much the application fee is for this GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Bharti 2026 can note that the fee is category-based and refundable to those who actually appear for the exam. Unreserved category candidates must pay ₹500, while reserved category candidates - including women of all categories, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwD, and ex-servicemen - pay ₹400. Fee is accepted only through online modes such as debit card, internet banking, UPI, or wallets, and a transaction fee applies in addition to the exam fee. The fee must be paid by 6 August 2026 (11:59 PM), failing which the application will not be considered valid.

age_limit.details: Candidates checking the age criteria for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026 can note that the standard age limit is 18 to 36 years as on 3 August 2026 , with category-wise relaxation extending eligibility up to 45 years for certain candidates. General category women and reserved category candidates (both men and women) get a 5-year relaxation, taking their upper limit to 41 years, while reserved category women get a 10-year relaxation up to 45 years. Persons with disabilities get further relaxation depending on category and gender, going up to a maximum of 45 years, and ex-servicemen get relaxation equal to their years of service plus three additional years. | Category Relaxation Maximum Age General category women 5 years 41 years Reserved category men & women 5 years 41 years Reserved category women 10 years 45 years General category PwD (male) 10 years 45 years General category PwD (female) 15 years 45 years Reserved category PwD (male) 15 years 45 years Reserved category PwD (female) 20 years 45 years Ex-servicemen Service period + 3 years As applicable

qualification.details: Candidates wondering about eligibility for the GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Junior Recruitment 2026 can note that the board accepts three alternate qualification routes for each trade group. A candidate qualifies with either a relevant engineering/technology diploma or advanced vocational diploma with prescribed post-qualification experience, a Bachelor's degree in the relevant engineering branch with one year of post-qualification experience, or a Craft Instructor Training Scheme (CITS)/National Craft Instructor Certificate (NCIC) in the same or relevant trade along with the required field experience. | Candidates checking the age criteria for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026 can note that the standard age limit is 18 to 36 years as on 3 August 2026, with category-wise relaxation extending eligibility up to 45 years for certain candidates. General category women and reserved category candidates (both men and women) get a 5-year relaxation, taking their upper limit to 41 years, while reserved category women get a 10-year relaxation up to 45 years. Persons with disabilities get further relaxation depending on category and gender, going up to a maximum of 45 years, and ex-servicemen get relaxation equal to their years of service plus three additional years.

salary_details.details: Candidates asking about in-hand salary for the GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026 can note that selected candidates start on a fixed monthly pay rather than the full regular scale. For the first five years of service, appointees receive a fixed pay of ₹40,800 per month. After completing five years with a satisfactory service record, the employee moves into the regular Pay Level-5 scale of ₹29,200 to ₹92,300 under the Seventh Pay Commission structure, along with other applicable allowances and benefits.

selection_process: 3 Admit card release Expected 1–2 weeks before exam
4 Written exam (CBRT/OMR) To be notified separately
5 Provisional result declaration A few weeks after the exam
6 Document verification (2x vacancies) After result declaration
7 Final selection & waiting list After document verification
Candidates preparing for the Gujarat Supervisor Instructor Bharti 2026 can note that selection happens through a single competitive written exam followed by document verification
without any separate interview stage. The exam is a CBRT/OMR-based Multiple Choice Question (MCQ) test comprising Part-A (90 marks
for a combined 210 questions to be attempted in 3 hours (180 minutes)
with a negative marking of 1/4 mark for each wrong answer. Both parts carry an independent qualifying standard of 40% minimum marks

and candidates who clear both cutoffs are ranked on total merit. Roughly twice the number of vacancies (category-wise) are then called for document verification before the final selection list and waiting list are published.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about eligibility for the GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Junior Recruitment 2026 can note that the board accepts three alternate qualification routes for each trade group. A candidate qualifies with either a relevant engineering/technology diploma or advanced vocational diploma with prescribed post-qualification experience, a Bachelor's degree in the relevant engineering branch with one year of post-qualification experience, or a Craft Instructor Training Scheme (CITS)/National Craft Instructor Certificate (NCIC) in the same or relevant trade along with the required field experience. Candidates checking the age criteria for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026 can note that the standard age limit is 18 to 36 years as on 3 August 2026 , with category-wise relaxation extending eligibility up to 45 years for certain candidates. General category women and reserved category candidates (both men and women) get a 5-year relaxation, taking their upper limit to 41 years, while reserved category women get a 10-year relaxation up to 45 years. Persons with disabilities get further relaxation depending on category and gender, going up to a maximum of 45 years, and ex-servicemen get relaxation equal to their years of service plus three additional years.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates asking how much the application fee is for this GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Bharti 2026 can note that the fee is category-based and refundable to those who actually appear for the exam. Unreserved category candidates must pay ₹500 , while reserved category candidates - including women of all categories, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwD, and ex-servicemen - pay ₹400 . Fee is accepted only through online modes such as debit card, internet banking, UPI, or wallets, and a transaction fee applies in addition to the exam fee. The fee must be paid by 6 August 2026 (11:59 PM) , failing which the application will not be considered valid.

rows.category: Reserved (Women – all categories, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwD, Ex-servicemen)

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates preparing for the Gujarat Supervisor Instructor Bharti 2026 can note that selection happens through a single competitive written exam followed by document verification, without any separate interview stage. The exam is a CBRT/OMR-based Multiple Choice Question (MCQ) test comprising Part-A (90 marks, general topics) and Part-B (120 marks, trade-specific subject matter), for a combined 210 questions to be attempted in 3 hours (180 minutes), with a negative marking of 1/4 mark for each wrong answer. Both parts carry an independent qualifying standard of 40% minimum marks, and candidates who clear both cutoffs are ranked on total merit. Roughly twice the number of vacancies (category-wise) are then called for document verification before the final selection list and waiting list are published.

rows.estimated_timeline: A few weeks after the exam

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Apply Online: Step-by-Step Process
content_sections.text: Candidates looking for the GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Apply Online 2026 procedure can follow these steps to complete their application without errors. The entire process is online, and only one confirmed application per candidate (per post) is considered valid, so accuracy at every step matters.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Salary and Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates asking about in-hand salary for the GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026 can note that selected candidates start on a fixed monthly pay rather than the full regular scale. For the first five years of service, appointees receive a fixed pay of ₹40,800 per month . After completing five years with a satisfactory service record, the employee moves into the regular Pay Level-5 scale of ₹29,200 to ₹92,300 under the Seventh Pay Commission structure, along with other applicable allowances and benefits.

content_sections.heading: Document and Certificate Requirements
content_sections.text: Candidates shortlisted for document verification in this Sarkari Naukri 2026 opportunity must keep all original certificates ready, since incomplete or mismatched documents can lead to rejection at any stage. Required documents typically include educational qualification certificates, birth/school leaving certificate for date of birth proof, category certificate (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS, where applicable), non-creamy layer certificate for SEBC candidates, disability certificate for PwD candidates, ex-servicemen certificate where applicable, and a recent passport-size photograph matching the one uploaded during application. Widowed women candidates claiming preference benefits, and sportspersons claiming grace marks, must also submit supporting certificates from designated authorities at the time of document verification.

content_sections.heading: GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Apply Online Link
content_sections.text: Candidates ready to submit their form should use the official OJAS portal directly rather than any third-party link, since the recruitment process for this GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Junior Assistant-equivalent Class-3 post is handled exclusively through the Gujarat government's own portal. Apply Online: ojas.gujarat.gov.in

content_sections.text: Many applicants lose out on valid vacancies not because they are ineligible, but because of avoidable errors during the application process. faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 3 August 2026 (11:59 PM), while the fee payment deadline is 6 August 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are 436 vacancies in total across seven Supervisor Instructor trade groups — Civil Construction, Electrical, Employability Skills, Fabrication, Apparel and Fashion, Medical and Nursing, and Refrigeration and Air Conditioning.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 36 years old as on 3 August 2026, with category-wise relaxation extending eligibility up to a maximum of 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Unreserved category candidates pay ₹500, while reserved category candidates (women of all categories, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwD, and ex-servicemen) pay ₹400.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: A relevant engineering/technology diploma with experience, a Bachelor's degree in the relevant engineering branch with one year of experience, or a CITS/NCIC certificate with required experience qualifies candidates, depending on the specific trade group's Appendix-A criteria.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a single CBRT/OMR MCQ written exam (Part-A and Part-B, 210 questions, 3 hours) followed by document verification of shortlisted candidates and final merit-based selection.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for GSSSB Supervisor Instructor?
faq.answer: Selected candidates get a fixed pay of ₹40,800 per month for the first five years, after which they move to the regular Level-5 pay scale of ₹29,200 to ₹92,300.
